name: datto-bcdr-mcp
description: Sync your whole Datto BCDR fleet into local SQLite and answer the questions the per-appliance Partner Portal can't: which backups failed screenshot verification, which are stale, and which clients are at risk.

datto_bcdr_public_key.title: DATTO_BCDR_PUBLIC_KEY
datto_bcdr_public_key.description: Sets DATTO_BCDR_PUBLIC_KEY for the Datto BCDR MCP server.

datto_bcdr_secret_key.title: DATTO_BCDR_SECRET_KEY
datto_bcdr_secret_key.description: Sets DATTO_BCDR_SECRET_KEY for the Datto BCDR MCP server.
